ccs / trace atlas

A parent-first reading of the report-only historical matcher.

OverviewConcentration ledgerCausal forestWithheld findingsMethod and limits

Historical detached-child classification · July 12 onward

Trace the spawners, not 1,480 rows.

This dossier reorders the existing strict-match manifest around the sessions that generated the work. It is evidence for review only: it cannot apply metadata, archive a session, or alter the classifier.

No catalogue metadata is written. No session is archived. No proposal is applied from this page.

Method and limits

Strict matching remains unchanged. Exact proposals require one-to-one prompt, cwd, entrypoint, provider/model, and narrow timestamp evidence. Index and catalogue labels above are navigation convenience only; they do not make an inference stronger.
  • Raw prompts are intentionally absent. Prompt SHA-256 values remain as reproducible evidence.
  • Provider/model mismatches, prompt mismatches, duplicate claims, ambiguity, and timestamp/CWD mismatches remain withheld.
  • This artifact reads context through read-only SQLite handles and writes only this HTML file.
  • Any application or archive decision requires a separately reviewed operation; this page exposes no control for one.
